# External Data

This folder contains external data sources and fetched data.

## Files

- `weather_data_2023-07-01_to_2023-07-03.csv` - Weather data fetched from Open-Meteo API

## Data Sources

### Weather Data
- **Source**: Open-Meteo API (https://open-meteo.com/)
- **Format**: CSV with hourly weather data
- **Columns**: time, temperature_2m, precipitation, wind_speed_10m, weathercode
- **Generated by**: `scripts/weather_fetch.py`

## Usage

External data files can be used as input for various analysis and modeling tasks. Refer to the main project documentation for specific usage instructions.
